test_name: Verify User Can Login Via GitHub
description: This test ensures that a user can log in through GitHub authentication and access the main dashboard of the RoostGPT platform.
steps: Identify the GitHub login option using the stable selector.
Verify the GitHub authentication page appears.
Check if the user is redirected to 'https://dev.roost.ai/roostgpt/tests'.
Verify the user's profile information on the dashboard.
expected_results: User is directed to the GitHub authentication page.
Successful login redirects the user to 'https://dev.roost.ai/roostgpt/tests'.
User's profile data is visible on the dashboard.
edge_cases: User's GitHub account lacks required permissions.
Simultaneous login attempts from different browsers.
Session timeout during the GitHub authentication process.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure GitHub login is accessible via keyboard.
Check for screen-reader compatibility during login.
